positive: A mesmerizing and stylized composition featuring a group of diverse, mythical forest creatures—a glowing stag, a stylized owl, and intricate fox silhouettes—intertwined amongst vibrant, bioluminescent foliage. The artwork should employ a deep indigo and emerald color palette, accented by warm gold and soft teal glow effects. The composition must be highly centered, suitable for a repeating pattern or central print on apparel, emphasizing clean, graphic silhouettes and strong, magical contrast. Style should be 'Art Nouveau meets modern maximalism' with crisp linework and ethereal glowing elements. Studio quality, high resolution, perfect symmetry, vector art aesthetic, clean edges, suitable for screen printing.
